lines.speaker: Wizard Gary
lines.text: I'm Gary, the wizard. I've not actually been qualified for very long, so I'm living here near the rune shop so I can keep practicing the magical arts.

lines.speaker: Wizard Gary
lines.text: I seem to be raising a cat, too, ever since some local lady persuaded me to buy one off her.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is the cat supposed to help you get runes too?

lines.speaker: Wizard Gary
lines.text: No! I know there are places where people think it's normal to swap cats for runes, but that will NOT happen to Sookie!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you're a wizard, are you doing anything magical?

lines.speaker: Wizard Gary
lines.text: Always! But I'm not looking for any assistance from passing adventurers, if that's what you were thinking. Maybe another time.

sections.title: If the 25th Anniversary event was completed

lines.speaker: Wizard Gary
lines.text: Thank you so much for helping me open the Realm of Memories, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you going to do now?

lines.speaker: Wizard Gary
lines.text: I'm a qualified wizard now, thanks to you. So I've settled here, near a handy rune shop, so I can keep practicing the magical arts while I raise this cat that some local lady persuaded me to buy.

lines.speaker: Wizard Gary
lines.text: Maybe I'll need your help with another project in future, but for now, I think I'm okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you open the portal to the Realm again?

lines.speaker: Wizard Gary
lines.text: The mementos expired, so no. I'm not really interested in repeating that project, anyway - I prefer my work to bring fresh challenges, rather than just recycling copies of stuff I did before.
